auth.source: There's an Enterprise version of Label Studio packed with more features and automation to label data faster while ensuring the highest quality.
auth.target: Label Studio 企业版提供了更多功能和自动化能力，可更快地标注数据并确保最高质量。

labeling.source: The instruction field supports HTML markup and it allows use of images, iframes (pdf).
labeling.target: 说明字段支持 HTML 标记，并允许使用图片、iframe（PDF）。

labeling.source: Upload predictions to automatically prelabel your data and speed up annotation. Import predictions from multiple model versions to compare their performance, or connect live models from the Model page to generate predictions on demand.
labeling.target: 上传预测结果以自动预标注你的数据并加快标注。你可以从多个模型版本导入预测结果以比较其表现，或从模型页面连接实时模型按需生成预测。
使用预测结果对任务进行预标注

labeling.source: What are the key benefits of using Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) for dataset collection in the context of Large Language Model (LLM) generation?
labeling.target: 在大语言模型（LLM）生成场景中，使用基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）进行数据集收集的主要优势是什么？

labeling.target: 编写说明以帮助用户完成标注任务。

settings.target: 添加你的第一个云存储

settings.source: Allows continuous region creation using the selected label
settings.target: 允许使用所选标签连续创建区域

settings.source: Amazon S3 with IAM Role is available in Label Studio Enterprise.
settings.target: 带 IAM Role 的 Amazon S3 在 Label Studio 企业版中可用。
自动选择新创建的区域

settings.source: Azure Blob Storage with Service Principal is available in Label Studio Enterprise.
settings.target: 带 Service Principal 的 Azure Blob 存储在 Label Studio 企业版中可用。

settings.source: Configure the labeling interface with tags.
settings.target: 使用标签配置标注界面。

settings.target: 使用标签配置标注界面。查看所有标签。

settings.source: Configure your AWS S3 connection with all required Label Studio settings
settings.target: 使用所有必需的 Label Studio 设置配置你的 AWS S3 连接

settings.source: Configure your Azure Blob Storage connection using Service Principal authentication for enhanced security (proxy only)
settings.target: 使用 Service Principal 身份验证配置你的 Azure Blob 存储连接以增强安全性（仅代理）

settings.source: Configure your Azure Blob Storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
settings.target: 使用所有必需的 Label Studio 设置配置你的 Azure Blob 存储连接

settings.source: Configure your Databricks Unity Catalog Volumes connection with all required settings (proxy only)
settings.target: 使用所有必需设置配置你的 Databricks Unity Catalog Volumes 连接（仅代理）

settings.source: Configure your Google Cloud Storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
settings.target: 使用所有必需的 Label Studio 设置配置你的 Google Cloud Storage 连接

settings.source: Configure your Google Cloud Storage connection with Workload Identity Federation authentication (proxy only)
settings.target: 使用 Workload Identity Federation 身份验证配置你的 Google Cloud Storage 连接（仅代理）

settings.source: Configure your local file storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
settings.target: 使用所有必需的 Label Studio 设置配置你的本地文件存储连接

settings.source: Configure your Redis storage connection with all required Label Studio settings
settings.target: 使用所有必需的 Label Studio 设置配置你的 Redis 存储连接

settings.source: Connect a machine learning model to generate live predictions for your project. Compare predictions, accelerate labeling with automatic prelabeling, and direct your team to the most impactful tasks through active learning.
settings.target: 连接机器学习模型，为你的项目生成实时预测。比较预测结果，使用自动预标注加速标注，并通过主动学习让团队优先处理最有价值的任务。

settings.source: Databricks Files (UC Volumes) is available in Label Studio Enterprise.
settings.target: Databricks Files（UC Volumes）在 Label Studio 企业版中可用。

settings.source: Deleting a project removes all tasks, annotations, and project data from the database.
settings.target: 删除项目会从数据库中移除所有任务、标注和项目数据。
启用增强的令牌认证安全性

settings.source: Enable legacy access tokens, these do not expire
settings.target: 启用旧版访问令牌，这些令牌不会过期

settings.source: Enables quick selection of labels using hotkeys
settings.target: 支持使用快捷键快速选择标签

settings.source: Google Cloud Storage with Workload Identity Federation is available in Label Studio Enterprise.
settings.target: 带 Workload Identity Federation 的 Google Cloud Storage 在 Label Studio 企业版中可用。

settings.source: If the Data Manager is not loading, dropping all Data Manager tabs can help.
settings.target: 如果数据管理未加载，清空所有数据管理标签页可能会有所帮助。

settings.source: Learn more about cloud storage (opens in new window)
settings.target: 了解更多云存储信息（在新窗口中打开）

settings.source: Learn more about cloud storage troubleshooting
settings.target: 了解更多云存储故障排查信息

settings.source: Learn more about machine learning models (opens in new window)
settings.target: 了解更多机器学习模型（在新窗口中打开）
让我们连接你的第一个模型

settings.source: Perform these actions at your own risk. Actions you take on this page can't be reverted. Make sure your data is backed up.
settings.target: 执行这些操作需自行承担风险。你在此页面执行的操作无法撤销。请先确认你的数据已备份。

settings.source: Reset Cache may help in cases like if you are unable to modify the labeling configuration due to validation errors concerning existing labels, but you are confident that the labels don't exist. You can use this action to reset the cache and try again.
settings.target: 如果由于现有标签的校验错误而无法修改标注配置，但你确认这些标签并不存在，重置缓存可能会有帮助。你可以使用此操作重置缓存并重试。

settings.source: Simplify project management by organizing projects into workspaces.
settings.target: 通过将项目组织到工作区中来简化项目管理。

settings.source: Tasks are chosen according to model uncertainty score (active learning mode).
settings.target: 任务会根据模型不确定性分数进行选择（主动学习模式）。

settings.source: Tasks are chosen with uniform random
settings.target: 任务以均匀随机方式选择

settings.source: Tasks are ordered by Task ID
settings.target: 任务按任务 ID 排序

settings.source: The number of days, after creation, that the token will be valid for. After this time period a user will need to create a new access token
settings.target: 令牌创建后可生效的天数。超过该时间后，用户需要重新创建新的访问令牌。

settings.source: Use cloud or database storage as the source for your labeling tasks or the target of your completed annotations.
settings.target: 使用云存储或数据库存储作为标注任务的数据源，或作为已完成标注的目标存储。

settings.source: When pre-signed URLs are enabled, all data bypasses the platform and user browsers directly read data from storage
settings.target: 启用预签名 URL 后，所有数据都绕过平台，用户浏览器将直接从存储读取数据

storage.source: Choose how to interpret your data from storage
storage.target: 选择如何解析来自存储的数据

storage.source: Import your data from cloud storage providers
storage.target: 从云存储提供商导入你的数据

storage.source: When pre-signed URLs are enabled, all data bypasses the platform and user browsers directly read data from storage
storage.target: 启用预签名 URL 后，所有数据都绕过平台，用户浏览器将直接从存储读取数据

webhooks.source: Setup integrations that subscribe to certain events using Webhooks. When an event is triggered, Label Studio sends an HTTP POST request to the configured webhook URL.
webhooks.target: 设置使用 Webhook 订阅特定事件的集成。当事件被触发时，Label Studio 会向已配置的 Webhook URL 发送 HTTP POST 请求。

generic.source: Apply your AWS spend to Label Studio Enterprise
generic.target: 将你的 AWS 承诺消费用于 Label Studio 企业版

generic.source: Assign roles to your team using Label Studio Enterprise and control access to sensitive data at the project and workspace levels.
generic.target: 使用 Label Studio 企业版为团队分配角色，并在项目和工作区级别控制对敏感数据的访问。

generic.source: Combine automation plus human supervision to evaluate and ensure LLM quality in the Enterprise platform.
generic.target: 在企业版平台中结合自动化与人工监督，评估并确保 LLM 质量。

generic.source: Enable Single Sign-On for your team using SAML, SCIM2 or LDAP with Label Studio Enterprise.
generic.target: 使用 Label Studio 企业版的 SAML、SCIM2 或 LDAP 为你的团队启用单点登录。

generic.source: It looks like your team is growing!
generic.target: 看起来你的团队正在壮大！

generic.source: Label Studio Enterprise is now available on the AWS Marketplace so you can use your committed spend to streamline data labeling workflows.
generic.target: Label Studio 企业版现已上架 AWS Marketplace，你可以使用已承诺的 AWS 消费额度来简化数据标注工作流。
已标注区域将显示在这里

generic.source: Link regions to define relationships between them
generic.target: 链接区域以定义它们之间的关系
使用自动标注节省时间

generic.source: Select a region to view its properties, metadata and available actions
generic.target: 选择一个区域以查看其属性、元数据和可用操作

generic.source: Start labeling and track your results
generic.target: 开始标注并跟踪你的结果

generic.source: Try Label Studio Starter Cloud, optimized for small teams and projects.
generic.target: 试试为小团队和项目优化的 Label Studio Starter Cloud。

generic.source: Use automation to instantly label large-scale datasets without sacrificing quality in the Enterprise platform.
generic.target: 使用自动化可即时标注大规模数据集，同时在企业版平台中不牺牲质量。

generic.source: Want to simplify and secure logging in?
generic.target: 想让登录更简单、更安全吗？

generic.source: You can connect ML models using the backend SDK to save time with pre-labeling or active learning.
generic.target: 你可以通过后端 SDK 连接 ML 模型，利用预标注或主动学习来节省时间。

generic.source: You can control access to specific projects and workspaces for internal team members and external annotators using Label Studio Enterprise.
generic.target: 使用 Label Studio 企业版，你可以为内部团队成员和外部标注员控制特定项目和工作区的访问权限。

generic.source: You can increase the quality of your labeled data with reviewer workflows and task agreement scores using Label Studio Enterprise.
generic.target: 你可以使用 Label Studio 企业版的审核流程和任务一致性评分来提高标注数据质量。

generic.source: You can save time managing infrastructure and upgrades, plus access more features for automation, quality, and team management, by using the Enterprise cloud service.
generic.target: 使用企业云服务，你可以节省基础设施与升级维护时间，并获得更多自动化、质量管理和团队管理功能。
